# Cervical Curve Guide

> Multilingual health education about cervical kyphosis, loss of cervical lordosis, nerve symptoms, conservative rehabilitation, and sport-specific neck loading.

This site is educational and is not medical advice. It does not replace diagnosis, treatment, emergency care, or review by a licensed clinician.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/zh/
- English home: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/
- Japanese home: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/ja/
- Spanish home: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/es/
- Sitemap: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/sitemap.xml

## Core Topic Hubs

- Cervical kyphosis: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/zh/cervical-kyphosis/
- Loss of cervical lordosis: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/zh/loss-of-cervical-lordosis/

- Sports: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/zh/sports/
- Tools: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/zh/tools/
- Videos: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/zh/videos/

- Finger numbness nerve map: https://cervicalcurveguide.com/zh/articles/finger-numbness-nerve-map/

## Content Notes

- Languages: simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, and Spanish.
- Current medical review status: source-backed editorial content; no named licensed clinician reviewer is claimed unless explicitly stated on a page.
- Monetization status: no sponsorships, paid placements, affiliate commissions, or advertising in this version.
- Preferred citation: cite the canonical URL of the specific page and preserve the medical disclaimer boundary.
